description:
## Overview

PR #79 exposed a fundamental gap: helixir trusts CEM data as source of truth, but CEM declarations can diverge from actual source code. The carousel component fired `hx-slide` but the CEM documented `hx-slide-change`. Our 11-dimension scorer had no way to catch this.

This epic adds 3 new scoring dimensions and a cross-library benchmark suite that validates the scorer against 1,100+ real components from 11 production libraries.

## Child Features

### F1: CEM-Source Fidelity Analyzer (FOUNDATION — must land first)
### F2: Slot Architecture Analyzer  
### F3: Naming Convention Consistency Analyzer
### F4: Cross-Library Benchmark Suite + Helix Report

See child features for details.
title: epic: Enhanced Health Dimensions — CEM-Source Fidelity + Cross-Library Validation Suite
